programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.
